sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_data (id UInt32, values Array(Int32), fill_value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, arrayShiftLeft(values, 2, fill_value) as shifted_values FROM test_array_data WHERE id GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_array_data WHERE fill_value = 0);
SELECT id, arrayShiftLeft(values, -1, -1) AS shifted_neg_1 FROM test_array_data HAVING shifted_neg_1 GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT arrayShiftLeft(values, 0) FROM test_array_data);
CREATE TABLE temp_array_data AS SELECT arrayShiftLeft(values, 3, NULL) AS modified_values FROM test_array_data WHERE id > 1;
INSERT INTO temp_array_data SELECT values FROM (SELECT arrayShiftLeft(values, 1, fill_value) AS values FROM test_array_data) AS sub;
SELECT id, arrayShiftLeft(NULL, 2, -1) AS null_shift FROM test_array_data WHERE fill_value GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT fill_value FROM test_array_data);

SELECT id, arrayShiftLeft(values, 2) AS shifted_vals FROM test_array_data WHERE (shifted_vals IS NOT NULL) AND (id GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_array_data WHERE fill_value IS NOT NULL));

SELECT a.id, arrayShiftLeft(b.values, 1) AS b_shifted FROM test_array_data AS a JOIN (SELECT id, arrayShiftLeft(values, 1) AS values FROM test_array_data) AS b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.values GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT fill_value FROM test_array_data);
SELECT id, arrayShiftLeft(values, 4, 'fallback') AS filled_shifted FROM test_array_data GROUP BY id HAVING filled_shifted GLOBAL NOT IN ('a', 'b', 'c');
